name: engineering-toolkit
description: Engineering toolkit — 37 composable skills, 10 agents, 23 rules, 9 hooks. All skills and agents run on opus. Subagents communicate via artifact files under .claude/artifacts/<id>/ (paths, not raw text). Two orchestrators: AI-DLC (adaptive intent-to-production lifecycle with product discovery, structured investigation, adaptive planning, domain/logical design split, pre-Construct adversarial red-team review with loop-back routing, NFR tracking, adversarial code review, traceability, task decomposition, auto doc updates, and post-deploy observability) and ship-n-check (6-stage git pipeline; CI/CD and staging waits are backgrounded commands re-invoked on exit — never sleep-polled). Config-driven git conventions. Mode switching (dev/research/review). Session handoff with strategic compaction. Harness engineering. Language-specific rules for TypeScript, Python, Go. Git safety hooks. Skill-first + evidence-based prompt enforcement. Framework stacks split into separate plugins: nestjs-toolkit, django-toolkit, nextjs-toolkit.
